step6.label: step 6 → new Claude agent in right split

space1.command: id=$(herdr workspace list | jq -r '.result.workspaces[]|select(.number==1).workspace_id'); [ -n "$id" ] && herdr workspace focus "$id"
space1.label: space 1 → herdr workspace 1 (nop if absent)

track1.command: ws=$(herdr workspace list | jq -r '.result.workspaces[]|select(.focused).workspace_id'); id=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$ws" | jq -r '.result.tabs[]|select(.number==1).tab_id'); [ -n "$id" ] && herdr tab focus "$id"
track1.label: track 1 → herdr tab 1 (focused workspace, nop if absent)
